name: Large Bathroom Shower Caddy Bronze - Threshold™: Rust-Resistant Steel Organizer with Shelf Storage, 24" Height
description:
Clean up the edges of your tub or the floor of your shower by decluttering your hygiene essentials with the Large Bathroom Shower Caddy from Threshold™. This over-the-shower caddy hangs over your shower head to save space, and two suction cups help secure it to the wall to prevent it from swinging or slipping. You'll love how easy this caddy makes it to keep everything you need close at hand — two large baskets are the perfect size to hold shampoo and body wash bottles, a shallow dish provides a spot for bar soap and hooks let you hang washcloths or loofahs. Made from steel, this caddy will maintain its look and durability for lasting use.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
